name: Modeboard
tagline: One profile. Your whole Mac, ready.
description: Modeboard is a native Mac utility for creating profiles that switch your wallpaper, Dock, appearance, menu bar, and Desktop settings together.

requiredPermissions: Automation access to System Events and Finder for supported setting changes
release.undocumentedBehavior: Some appearance, Dock, menu bar, and Desktop changes depend on macOS behavior that Apple does not document as a stable third-party API.
release.animatedWallpaperLimitations: GIF and video wallpapers play while Modeboard is running. Quitting Modeboard stops animated wallpapers. Static and captured Apple/system wallpapers remain applied.

commercial.licenseScope: One person, on up to three personally controlled Macs
commercial.activation: Offline signed access code — no account or internet connection required to verify your license
commercial.updateMechanism: Sparkle, with user-controlled automatic checks plus a manual Check for Updates command
commercial.refundPolicy: Tideframe Labs offers a refund within 14 days of purchase. Before requesting a refund for a technical issue, customers may be asked to provide basic system information or try reasonable troubleshooting steps. This policy does not limit rights provided by applicable consumer law.
